items.title: Protective Coatings Market to Witness 5.20% CAGR by 2031 | SkyQuest Technology
items.author: N/A
items.description: The global protective coatings market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.20% from 2024 to 2031, reaching a value of $22.91 billion. The market is driven by the rising demand for corrosion protection and increasing infrastructure development, particularly in the Asia-Pacific region.
